name: Ancient Lock
description: An iron-banded chest sits half-buried in the roots of a dead oak, its lock a cunning mechanism of interlocking rings and sliding pins. No key exists for this device — only patience and sharp wits will coax it open.
failureConsequence: A hidden spring snaps shut, driving a thin needle into your thumb. The lock resets with a mocking click, and the venom leaves your hand numb and throbbing for hours.
